Merrimack River

Choose Your Adventure

Pick Your Trip

Striper fishing. Night runs. Booze cruises. Private charters. Something for every crew — don't get left at the dock.

🎣
STRIPER TRIPS
Anglers & First-Timers

🎣 Striper Trips

Hit the Merrimack River hard chasing trophy striped bass. Action-packed, nonstop, and built for people who came to fish.

  • ✓ Night Stripers Available
  • ✓ Limits Possible
  • ✓ Nonstop Action
⚓ Starting at [Confirm Price]
Book This Trip
🌙
NIGHT STRIPERS
Experienced Anglers

🌙 Night Stripers

Leaving at 5 PM, back around 10 PM. The river comes alive after dark — this is where the giants feed. Serious inquiries only.

  • ✓ 5 PM Departure
  • ✓ ~10 PM Return
  • ✓ Good Vibes Guaranteed
⚓ Starting at [Confirm Price]
Book This Trip
🍺
SUNSET / BOOZE CRUISE
Groups & Good Times

🍺 Sunset / Booze Cruise

Ice cold drinks. Music cranked loud. Sunset views turning into party mode. Non-stop laughs with the crew. ALL GAS. NO BRAKES. FULL SEND.

  • ✓ 6 PM – 9 PM
  • ✓ Ice Cold Drinks
  • ✓ Sunset on the Merrimack
⚓ Starting at [Confirm Price]
Book This Trip
⚓
PRIVATE CHARTER
Groups & Private Events

⚓ Private Charter

The whole boat is yours. Bachelor parties, birthdays, corporate outings, or just a crew that wants a private Salty Dawg experience.

  • ✓ Exclusive Boat
  • ✓ Your Crew Only
  • ✓ Custom Experience
⚓ Starting at [Confirm Price]
Book Private Charter

Not sure which trip? Reach out — we'll find the right fit.

The Salty Dawg Life

Pirate Hanson

About the Captain & Crew

This Is Our River.

We're not a corporate charter company. We're locals who live on this river, know every bend in the Merrimack, and wake up every day thinking about stripers.

The Salty Dawg II crew brings the local knowledge, the energy, and the good vibes — whether you're out here chasing giants or just watching the sunset with ice cold drinks and music cranked loud.

2026 Boat Hair Don't Care. This is our season. Come get salty with us.

🗺️ Local Water Knowledge
🦺 Safety First
👊 Experienced Crew
🎣 [Confirm License / Insurance]
📞 Call / Text to Book

⚡ Energy. Bring it.

Serious inquiries only. Bring gear. Bring energy. Let's get it.

Got Questions?

FAQ

How do I book? +
Call or text [Insert Phone Number] to check availability and lock in your spot. Limited spots — don't get left at the dock.
Where do trips leave from? +
[Confirm Launch Location / Dock Address] — on the Merrimack River.
How many people can come? +
[Confirm Max Guests] per trip. Private charters fill the whole boat.
Do I need fishing experience? +
Nope. Beginner-friendly all the way. If you're ready to have a good time, you're qualified.
Can kids come? +
[Confirm Age Policy] — ask when you book.
Do I need to bring gear? +
[Confirm Gear Policy] — check with us when booking.
Do I need a fishing license? +
[Confirm License / Insurance Policy]
Can we keep fish? +
[Confirm Catch & Keep Policy]
Is alcohol allowed? +
The booze cruise is literally in the name 🍺. Check with us on policies for fishing trips.
What happens if weather is bad? +
[Confirm Weather Policy] — we'll let you know ASAP if conditions change.
Is a deposit required? +
[Confirm Deposit Policy]
